utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all five of these categories. Each category is filled with detailed content and cost information (even if some costs are bundled or not broken down, they are still included as requested). Health coverage includes both physical and mental health with costs; property coverage includes home/contents insurance with costs; travel coverage includes travel insurance details with costs; additional services lists enhancements and associated costs; and total_budget provides the full monthly and annual cost breakdown. Therefore, all 5 items are present and reasonably specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan selected by the AI assistant includes the following elements: (1) health_coverage with 'PrimeCare Premium Plan6 - Physical Health Coverage' and 'PrimeCare Premium Plan6 - Mental Health & Stress Management Programs'; (2) property_coverage with 'PrimeCare Premium Plan6 - Property Protection'; (3) travel_coverage with 'PrimeCare Premium Plan6 - Global Business Travel Protection'; and (4) additional_services including 'Premium concierge services' and '€75/month premium medical network addon'. The suffix 'Plan6' appears to represent a variant of the 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' family. In the ground-truth ratings, 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' receives a rating of 10 for both physical and mental health coverage. There is no 'PrimeCare Premium Plan' listed under property or travel categories, but analogous premium plans (PrimeHome Premium Coverage and PrimeTravel Premium Plan) also have ratings of 10. For the additional services, 'Premium concierge services' corresponds to 'Concierge Services' under travel_enhancement_services (rating 8), while 'premium medical network addon' corresponds to 'Premium Medical Network' (rating 10). Thus, all mapped items correspond to their closest ground-truth equivalents.
